summary: Sigma workbooks / members / datasets (read) plus class-1 refresh-workbook write verb. Apply mode triggers a real materialization; propose mode previews. Ghost-Shift-safe at class 1.

commands.summary: Fetch the authenticated Sigma member (validates OAuth2 credentials).
List workbooks visible to the authenticated member with id, name, path, owner, and timestamps.
Fetch a single workbook's metadata plus its page list.
List organization members (basic identity and role data).
List Sigma datasets visible to the authenticated member.

Trigger a materialization of a Sigma workbook via POST /v2/workbooks/{id}/materializations/schedule. Propose mode previews; apply mode POSTs. Class-1 shared_write — Ghost-Shift allows class ≤ 1 by default.
